text: MUSE | Talent Management Agency connecting brands on a global scale with a local touch. MUSE is the talent-first influencer marketing agency with exclusive access to a roster of over 200 talents in more than 30 different countries. We produce content campaigns curated to inspire conversation and provoke engagement. As a full-service agency, the 360 approach we provide ensures that content creates conversation. 25m+ Total followers 1.25b+ Total reach 12% Average engagement 100+ Country reach Crafting meaningful partnerships We are a creator and UGC Marketing Agency built around talent. Our global network of UGC creators and digital talent produces authentic, high-performing content designed for today’s social platforms. By combining creator partnerships, UGC production, and strategic storytelling , we help brands scale content that feels real, relatable, and engaging. From concept to execution, our 360° creator and UGC approach ensures every campaign delivers content that sparks conversation, builds trust, and drives engagement. Over 20 successful campaigns Trusted by over 50 companies We create strategic influencer and UGC marketing campaigns with clear objectives, data-driven insights, and transparent reporting. From UGC creator activations to long-term influencer partnerships , we manage every stage of the campaign, including creator sourcing, campaign management, and content production . Our philosophy is high impact over high volume . We work with a curated network of vetted creators and UGC talent , ensuring every piece of content meets the highest creative and performance standards. Clients
